mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_purchase_history( user_id, product_id, product_count, price, destination_id ) SELECT c.user_id, c.product_id, c.product_count, p.price, #{destinationId} FROM tbl_cart AS c INNER JOIN mst_product AS p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT h.purchased_at, p.product_name, h.price, h.product_count, d.family_name, d.first_name, d.address FROM tbl_purchase_history AS h INNER JOIN mst_product AS p ON h.product_id = p.id INNER JOIN mst_destination AS d ON h.destination_id = d.id WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} AND h.status = 1 ORDER BY h.purchased_at DESC
